headline: Citigroup Reportedly Lowers 2026 Bitcoin And Ethereum Targets, Cites Stalling Legislation
summary: Citigroup (NYSE:C) has cut its targets for Bitcoin and Ethereum for this year, according to media reports. The investment bank reportedly expects Bitcoin and Ethereum to reach $112,000 and $3,175 this year. The targets are lower than the bank’s initial...

headline: Why The Narrative Around Archrock (AROC) Is Shifting With Higher Targets And Compression Demand
summary: Archrock’s modeled fair value price target has been nudged higher, moving from US$36.67 to US$38.44, roughly a 4.9% change in the updated estimate. Analysts linking this shift to compression demand, natural gas trends, and recent Q4 results now cluster around targets in the high US$30s to low US$40s, with some describing the company as “firing on all cylinders.” As you read on, you will see how these evolving assumptions shape the current narrative and what to watch next. Analyst Price...

headline: Netflix Is $2.8 Billion Richer After Losing Warner to Paramount. What It Could Do With the Cash.
summary: Netflix  stock has been on a tear ever since the video streamer dropped out of the bidding war for  Warner Bros. Discovery  How’s that for a plot twist?  Paramount has cratered 16% over the past month as investors worry about the company’s mounting debt load.  “Paramount is paying a stiff price, and its winning bid may turn out to be a Pyrrhic victory,” we wrote on Feb. 27, after Netflix bowed out of the takeover battle.

headline: How The easyJet (LSE:EZJ) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: easyJet’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from £6.02 to £5.78, while fresh price targets now cluster around £5.40 and £6.80. Analysts are split, with some keeping positive ratings and even issuing upgrades, and others downgrading the shares as they reassess how confidently easyJet can deliver on existing forecasts. Read on to see what is driving this debate and how you can keep track as the story develops. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our...
